ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat C2 over legitimate cloud-storage APIs (pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox)
ucs.description: Hunts non-browser, non-cloud-client processes making HTTPS requests to api.pcloud.com, cloud-api.yandex.net, api.dropboxapi.com and other API endpoints that ScarCruft's RokRat / DOGCALL / GOLDBACKDOOR malware uses for bidirectional C2. APT37 is the primary state actor known to abuse these specific APIs (T1102.002) — the combination of (a) a non-installed-client process and (b) one of these exact API hostnames is the differentiator.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_ports values(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com") AND NOT (All_Traffic.process IN ("*\\chrome.exe","*\\msedge.exe","*\\firefox.exe","*\\brave.exe","*\\iexplore.exe","*\\Dropbox.exe","*\\Yandex.Disk.exe","*\\YandexDisk*.exe","*\\pCloud.exe","*\\Box.exe")) by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.process All_Traffic.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | where count >= 3
ucs.kql:
let _scarcruft_c2_hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com"]);
let _legit_clients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","Dropbox.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","YandexDisk2.exe","pCloud.exe","Box.exe","explorer.exe","OneDrive.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemoteUrl has_any (_scarcruft_c2_hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_legit_clients)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(Timestamp, 1m)),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine),
            RemoteHosts = make_set(RemoteUrl, 10)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath
| where ConnCount >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _scarcruft_c2_hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","webdav.yandex.ru","api.dropboxapi.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com"]);
let _legit_clients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","Dropbox.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","pCloud.exe","Box.exe","explorer.exe","OneDrive.exe"]);
ImWebSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DstHostname in~ (_scarcruft_c2_hosts) or Url has_any (_scarcruft_c2_hosts)
| extend _proc = tolower(tostring(split(ActingProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where _proc !in~ (_legit_clients)
| where SrcUsername !endswith "$"
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)),
            Hosts = make_set(DstHostname, 10),
            SampleCmd = any(ActingProcessCommandLine)
            by DvcHostname, SrcUsername, ActingProcessName
| where ConnCount >= 3
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft RokRat Cloud-API C2
id: 8d2f4a17-5ba9-4c2e-9e8f-3b41a2d7c9e1
status: experimental
description: Detects non-browser, non-cloud-client processes communicating with pCloud/Yandex/Dropbox API hostnames used by APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat/DOGCALL/GOLDBACKDOOR malware as bidirectional C2.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1102/002/
author: SOC
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_dest:
    DestinationHostname:
      - 'api.pcloud.com'
      - 'eapi.pcloud.com'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.net'
      - 'webdav.yandex.ru'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.box.com'
  filter_browsers:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\brave.exe'
      - '\iexplore.exe'
      - '\Dropbox.exe'
      - '\Yandex.Disk.exe'
      - '\pCloud.exe'
      - '\Box.exe'
      - '\OneDrive.exe'
      - '\explorer.exe'
  condition: selection_dest and not filter_browsers
falsepositives:
  - Custom in-house automation that uses these cloud SDKs from non-installer binaries
  - PowerShell-based backup scripts (allowlist via parent path)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - detection.threat_hunting
ucs.rationale: ScarCruft is one of very few APTs that has consistently chosen these specific cloud APIs (pCloud + Yandex Disk + Dropbox) for RokRat/DOGCALL bidirectional C2 across multiple campaigns from 2018 onward. The combination of (a) those exact hostnames and (b) a process that is NOT the official desktop client / a browser is essentially diagnostic of APT37 tradecraft — most other APTs prefer their own in

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImWebSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActorUsername` is not a column of ImWebSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImAuthentication, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImWebSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) malicious LNK spear-phishing chain — explorer.exe spawning interpreter that extracts embedded payload from .lnk
ucs.description: Hunts the signature APT37 initial-access chain: a user double-clicks an oversized LNK delivered via spear-phishing (often disguised as a HWP or PDF), explorer.exe spawns cmd.exe/powershell.exe, and the command line uses findstr/forfiles or PowerShell byte-reads against a .lnk file to carve out and run an embedded payload. This LNK-with-embedded-payload tradecraft is a hallmark of ScarCruft's RokRat and GOLDBACKDOOR droppers.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as image from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name=explorer.exe Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") (Processes.process="*findstr*.lnk*" OR Processes.process="*forfiles*.lnk*" OR (Processes.process="*FromBase64String*" AND Processes.process="*.lnk*") OR Processes.process="*-Encoding Byte*" OR (Processes.process="*ReadAllBytes*" AND Processes.process="*.lnk*") OR (Processes.process="*Get-Content*" AND Processes.process="*.lnk*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
| where FileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(findstr|forfiles)\b.{0,300}\.lnk")
     or (ProcessCommandLine has "FromBase64String" and ProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (ProcessCommandLine has_all ("Get-Content","-Encoding","Byte") and ProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (ProcessCommandLine has "ReadAllBytes" and ProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)copy\s+/b\b.{0,200}\.lnk")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Child = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemote = IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where ParentProcessName endswith "explorer.exe"
| extend _child = tolower(tostring(split(TargetProcessName, "\\")[-1]))
| where _child in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where (TargetProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)(findstr|forfiles)\b.{0,300}\.lnk")
     or (TargetProcessCommandLine has "FromBase64String" and TargetProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (TargetProcessCommandLine has_all ("Get-Content","-Encoding","Byte") and TargetProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (TargetProcessCommandLine has "ReadAllBytes" and TargetProcessCommandLine has ".lnk")
     or (TargetProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)copy\s+/b\b.{0,200}\.lnk")
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          Child = TargetProcessName,
          ChildCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
          ParentCmd = ParentProcessCommandLine
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft LNK Embedded-Payload Extraction Chain
id: 4f9c2a91-2b86-4f3e-9b13-7c8a36e2d502
status: experimental
description: Detects explorer.exe spawning a command interpreter that performs byte-level extraction from a .lnk file - characteristic of APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRat/GOLDBACKDOOR spearphishing droppers that embed the payload inside oversized LNKs.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1566/001/
author: SOC
date: 2026/05/06
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\explorer.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  selection_extract:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'findstr '
      - 'forfiles '
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-Encoding Byte'
      - 'ReadAllBytes'
      - 'copy /b'
  selection_lnk:
    CommandLine|contains: '.lnk'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and selection_extract and selection_lnk
falsepositives:
  - Rare administrative scripts that parse shortcut metadata
  - Backup tools enumerating Recent / Startup folders
level: high
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1566.001
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
ucs.rationale: The pattern of weaponising oversized LNK files that contain both a decoy and the executable payload, then extracting the payload at runtime via findstr/forfiles byte-search or PowerShell byte-reads, is one of APT37's (ScarCruft / Reaper / Group123) most consistent initial-access tradecraft signatures across RokRat, GOLDBACKDOOR and the 2022/2023 LNK-loader campaigns. The (explorer.exe parent) + (i

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?
